description_long: This is a vintage-style white ambulance vehicle with a long, boxy body and a raised roof, reminiscent of mid-20th-century American ambulances. The exterior is predominantly white with subtle red detailing, including a thin red stripe running along the sides and a red emergency light on the roof. The side windows are large, and there is a visible 'AMBULANCE' sign on the rear side panel. The front features dual headlights and a wide windshield, while the rear has two small red lights and a pair of compartment doors. The wheels are black, and the overall finish appears slightly worn, suggesting age or heavy use.
description: A vintage white ambulance with red detailing, roof-mounted emergency light, and 'AMBULANCE' signage on the side. It features a boxy body, large windows, and rear compartment doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual headlights, wide windshield, and the roof-mounted emergency light.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'AMBULANCE' sign, red stripe, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two small red lights and the rear compartment doors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible red detailing and side windows.
attribute_ambulance_signage: AMBULANCE text on side panel in red with gold border
